actions.name: Hooves
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the horse moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 5 (2d4) Bludgeoning damage and has the Prone condition.

tactical_info.combat_role: Heavy Mount - Combat-trained horse with charging capabilities
tactical_info.positioning: Uses exceptional 60 ft speed for charging attacks and mobility
tactical_info.damage_output: 9 bludgeoning damage (14 with charge) plus prone effect
tactical_info.key_abilities: High speed charging, prone effect, strong melee combat
tactical_info.weaknesses: Moderate AC and HP for a mount, requires distance for charge
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent heavy cavalry mount, strong solo combatant
